procedure:
Acknowledge the customer, gather essential information and update the support ticket

Step 1: Send a reply to the customer. Your message should start by greeting the customer and introducing yourself. Confirm that you will be taking over helping them and have reviewed the conversation so far. Gather additional information needed to begin the support process. Let them know that after they confirm additional details, you can start investigating how to solve their problem.

Step 2: Set the ticket priority to "High".

Step 3: Set the ticket status to "In Progress".
